title: Tablet of Truth
description:
You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.

options.title: Decipher
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

notes:
This is a [gold]multi-page event[/gold] where choosing to decipher locks you into a progression sequence. Each subsequent page shows the tablet's text becoming clearer and offers a choice to continue or give up.

[gold]Decipher Progression[/gold]:
- [blue]Page 1[/blue]: Cost 6 Max HP (Kin's Mantra speaks)
- [blue]Page 2[/blue]: Cost 12 Max HP (You feel faint)
- [blue]Page 3[/blue]: Cost 24 Max HP (You're barely holding on)
- [blue]Page 4[/blue]: Cost (MaxHP - 1) (Final word remains, "Lose Everything" button)
- [blue]Final[/blue]: Event ends, final word revealed: [b]"Air"[/b]

[red]Critical difference[/red]: On the final decipher (after page 4), [gold]ALL cards[/gold] in your deck are upgraded instead of just a random one. If your Max HP would reach 0 or below at any decipher step, you die immediately.
